title: papaver alpinum subsp. lapeyrouseanum
intro: Papaver alpinum subsp. lapeyrouseanum, also known as Lapeyrous' poppy, is a plant species within the poppy family that is native to the Alps. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum subsp. lapeyrouseanum include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
